title: Neviti Let It Snow Snowman Christmas Paper Plates, Multi-Colour, Pack of 8
features: Co-ordinates with both the 'Let it Snow' Father Christmas and Snowman ranges
Perfect for family buffets and other celebrations
Colourful design that can be mixed and matched with other festive decorations
description: Product Description Bold plates, featuring a friendly snowman and a robin design. Part of the ‘let it snow’ range of Christmas table ware, these practical, high-quality paper plates allow you to entertain in style this Christmas, and are ideal for buffets and other festive events. Supplied in packs of 8, each plate has a red rim and central snowman decoration against a snowflake background design. Box Contains 8 x Plates - Snowman
